name: Fudge Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate.
5. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour and baking soda.
6. Alternately add the sifted ingredients and buttermilk to the chocolate mixture.
7. Sprinkle the pecans evenly over the batter.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
9. Bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Makes 1 loaf.
